text: AI is increasingly common in the modern workplace. Many routine tasks are now handled through automation, such as data entry and basic customer inquiries, which saves time and reduces human effort. Productivity tools powered by AI help workers analyze information faster and manage projects more efficiently. Rather than replacing humans entirely, the focus is shifting to human-AI collaboration, where employees use AI as a smart assistant to make better decisions. This does mean some jobs are changing or disappearing, but new roles, such as AI trainers and analysts, are also being created. The key is to adapt by learning how to work alongside these systems.
